title: Seer (Viper)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the probe droid squadron|other [[Seer (disambiguation)]]s}}
[[File:Seer.jpg|thumb|right|150px|''Seer'' launches from the ''[[Vigiliance]]''.]]
'''''Seer''''' was the name given to a squadron of [[Viper probe droid/Legends|viper probe droids]] that served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the year [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

==History==
''Seer'' was stationed on the ''[[Vigiliance]]''. During the year 3 ABY, the Empire defeated the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] at the disastrous [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], but many of the Rebels fled the battle. A large number of these survivors were being escorted to friendly airspace by the [[Defiance Task Force]], which Admiral Holtz was assigned to destroy. He planned to do this by deploying dozens of viper probe droids across the galaxy in order to track down the Rebel fleet. Group ''Seer'' was among the probe groups assigned to this vital task.

''Seer'' was launched by the [[Corrupter Task Force]] in 3 ABY when the fleet was attacked by a pair of [[A-wing]]s from the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']]. At least two probes from ''Seer'' Group were launched by the ''Corrupter'', but both were destroyed by the pilot of the #2 A-wing, [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
